recommendations.title: Mountainhead
recommendations.overview: A group of billionaire friends get together against the backdrop of a rolling international crisis.

recommendations.title: Crazy in Alabama
recommendations.overview: An abused wife heads to California to become a movie star while her nephew back in Alabama has to deal with a racially-motivated murder involving a corrupt sheriff.

recommendations.title: Confessions of a Teenage Drama Queen
recommendations.overview: After moving to New Jersey, Lola bags a coveted role in a school play, which earns her the wrath of Carla, the most popular girl in school, who will do anything to ruin Lola's life.

recommendations.title: Lola Versus
recommendations.overview: Just three weeks before her wedding, Lola's longtime fiance, Luke, dumps her. With her 30th birthday looming and being forced to re-enter the New York City dating scene, she feels adrift in a cold world. She leans on her friends for support but, afte

recommendations.title: LOLA
recommendations.overview: Sussex, England, 1938. Shortly before the outbreak of World War II, Thomasina and Martha Hanbury, two ingenious sisters, create LOLA, a miraculous machine.

recommendations.title: Woody Allen: A Documentary
recommendations.overview: An intense portrait of the iconic filmmaker, writer, actor, comedian and musician Woody Allen: his life, family and friends; his writing and directing habits, and his relationship with performers.

recommendations.title: Mulholland Drive

recommendations.title: Run Lola Run
recommendations.overview: Lola receives a phone call from her boyfriend Manni. He lost 100,000 DM in a subway train that belongs to a very bad guy. She has 20 minutes to raise this amount and meet Manni. Otherwise, he will rob a store to get the money. Three different alterna

recommendations.title: The Dirties
recommendations.overview: The line between reality and fiction starts to blur when two best friends start making a movie about getting revenge on bullies.

recommendations.title: The Blue Angel
